title: Unity Software (U) Stock: Analyst Forecasts & Price Targets
text: Current Price & Consensus Rating: Current Price: $27.21. Consensus Rating: Moderate Buy. Average Price Target: $38.77 (representing 42.48% upside potential). Analyst Coverage: 22 Wall Street analysts have rated Unity Software within the past 12 months: 1 Strong Buy, 12 Buy ratings, 8 Hold ratings, 1 Sell rating. Price Target Range: Highest Target: $59.00. Lowest Target: $21.00. Average Target: $38.77. Analysts project moderate buy sentiment with substantial upside. The consensus suggests investors could see approximately 42% appreciation from current levels over the next 12 months. However, the wide range between high and low targets reflects meaningful disagreement about the stock's prospects among analysts. Recent Analyst Actions (May 2026): Multiple brokerages recently boosted their price targets, including Barclays, Wedbush, Wells Fargo, and Needham & Company, indicating growing confidence in the company's trajectory.
